document_targets: CORN_COUNTRY_ELEVATOR_OK_FALLBACK included as additional corn fallback/provenance check
corn_mapping_note: Strict Decatur/Gulf corn bid records were not found in prior USDA MARS broad search. Corn outputs are explicitly labeled as PROXY/FALLBACK and should not be represented as strict Decatur/Gulf data.
